## Scope
- Issue id: `MAR-XXXX`
- Objective: <single sentence>

## Traceability plan
- Planned branch: `mar-XXXX-<short-kebab-scope>`
- PR required by MAR-1145 Section 5: `yes/no`
- Expected artifacts (if needed): `docs/projects/marketgrid/mar-XXXX-<note>.md`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Branch naming follows standard
- [ ] Commit subject starts with `MAR-XXXX:`
- [ ] Commit body includes `Issue: MAR-XXXX`
- [ ] PR evidence (or bootstrap exception) recorded
- [ ] Closeout comment includes branch/commit/PR mapping
